sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ltrim (id INT, description VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_ltrim (id, description) VALUES (1, ltrim(E' \t\fab \tdf '));
UPDATE test_ltrim SET description = ltrim(E' \t\new_string ') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, ltrim(description) AS trimmed_description FROM test_ltrim WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_ltrim2 AS SELECT id, ltrim(description) AS trimmed_description FROM test_ltrim;
